items.title: Foreign nationals among at least 21 killed in Delhi fire
items.dek: Many victims were South Asians who had travelled to India for treatment or to accompany relatives.
items.body: Many victims were South Asians who had travelled to India for treatment or to accompany relatives.

items.title: Seven killed after drone hits bus in Russia-controlled part of Ukraine
items.dek: The bus was travelling between Moscow and Simferopol, in Russian-occupied Crimea, an official says.
